title: The Golden Days
description: Makes the latest game version feel like alpha/beta versions.
body:
This modpack aims to recreate the beta version of Minecraft, well being on a modern Minecraft version. Seeds from beta versions will still work if the world type is set to Modern Beta. No items are added, only textures, world generation and game mechanics are changed. Some of the changes are sheep drop wool when punched, the hunger bar is removed and the Modern Beta world type was added.
